page_metadata.biotools__summary: It provides functions for joint normalization and difference detection in multiple Hi-C datasets. It operates on processed Hi-C data in the form of chromosome-specific chromatin interaction matrices. It accepts three-column tab-separated text files storing chromatin interaction matrices in a sparse matrix format which are available from several sources.
